compressed_prompt: create rock song lyrics for 'the gifted and the not gifted' in all caps, avoiding 'rock'.
response:
**"THE GIFTED AND THE NOT GIFTED"**

*(VERSE 1)*
BORN WITH A SPARK, THEY CALL IT LUCK,
WHILE WE GRIND IN THE FUCKING MUD.
THEY GET THE STAGE, WE GET THE SHAME,
SAME BLOOD, DIFFERENT NAME.

*(PRE-CHORUS)*
NO HANDOUTS, NO FAIRY TALES,
JUST A LADDER WITH MISSING RAILS.
THEY SAY "TRY HARDER," WELL, WE DO—
BUT THEY DON’T EVEN KNOW WHAT’S TRUE.

*(CHORUS)*
THE GIFTED AND THE NOT GIFTED,
ONE GETS THE CROWN, ONE GETS THE SHAFT.
THEY WRITE THE RULES, WE TAKE THE FALL,
SAME SKY, BUT NOT THE SAME AT ALL.

*(VERSE 2)*
THEY TALK ABOUT "MERIT," WHAT A JOKE,
WHILE THEIR DAD PULLS THE CHAINS.
WE BLEED FOR PENNIES, THEY GET THE GOLD,
SAME GAME, BUT WE’RE THE ONES GETTING SOLD.

*(PRE-CHORUS)*
NO HANDOUTS, NO FAIRY TALES,
JUST A LADDER WITH MISSING RAILS.
THEY SAY "PLAY FAIR," BUT THE DICE ARE LOADED,
AND THE HOUSE ALWAYS WINS—SO WHAT’S IT ALL FOR?

*(CHORUS)*
THE GIFTED AND THE NOT GIFTED,
ONE GETS THE CROWN, ONE GETS THE SHAFT.
THEY WRITE THE RULES, WE TAKE THE FALL,
SAME SKY, BUT NOT THE SAME AT ALL.

*(BRIDGE)*
OH, THEY’LL SAY "JUST WAIT YOUR TURN,"
BUT THE TURN NEVER COMES.
WE’RE THE FUEL, THEY’RE THE FLAME,
SAME FIRE, BUT NOT THE SAME.

*(OUTRO)*
SO HERE WE STAND, HERE WE BURN,
LESSONS LEARNED, BUT NOTHING EARNED.
THE GIFTED AND THE NOT GIFTED—
ONE DAY THE TABLES WILL BE SHIFTED.
